ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon (fuel efficiency) */,
  "cyl" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "disp" REAL /* Displacement of the engine */,
  "hp" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle */,
  "drat" REAL /* Rear axle ratio */,
  "wt" REAL /* Weight of the vehicle */,
  "qsec" REAL /* 1/4 mile time */,
  "vs" INTEGER /* V/S (engine type: V or straight) */,
  "am" INTEGER /* Transmission type (0 = automatic, 1 = manual) */,
  "gear" INTEGER /* Number of forward gears */,
  "carb" INTEGER /* Number of carburetors */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle model */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel the vehicle uses */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle manufacturer */,
  "chassis_type" TEXT /* Type of chassis */,
  "emissions" TEXT /* Emissions data */,
  "safety_rating" TEXT /* Safety rating of the vehicle */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle model started production */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle model ended production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_am FOREIGN KEY ("am") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vs FOREIGN KEY ("vs") REFERENCES engine_types ("engine_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_types" (
  "engine_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for engine type */,
  "engine_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the engine type (e.g., V, straight) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the engine type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer for the engine type */,
  "efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Efficiency rating of the engine type */,
  "emissions_rating" TEXT /* Emissions rating of the engine type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Description of the transmission type (e.g., Automatic, Manual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transmission type */,
  "gear_ratio" TEXT /* Gear ratio for different gears */,
  "torque_capacity" TEXT /* Maximum torque capacity of the transmission */,
  "efficiency_rating" TEXT /* Efficiency rating of the transmission */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer for the transmission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the metrics pertain to */,
  "mpg_efficiency" REAL /* Miles per gallon efficiency */,
  "engine_performance" REAL /* Engine performance rating */,
  "acceleration_0_60" REAL /* Time to accelerate from 0 to 60 mph */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Top speed of the vehicle */,
  "braking_distance" REAL /* Braking distance from 60 mph to 0 */,
  "emissions" TEXT /* Emissions data */,
  "safety_rating" TEXT /* Safety rating of the vehicle */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date when the performance metrics were measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the historical data is related to */,
  "specification_changes" TEXT /* Description of the specification changes made */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date when the changes were made */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the specification changes */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the changes */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., specification update, correction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., engineering, sales, marketing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
